title: fix(deps): update module github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl to v1.5.0
body:

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl (github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl)</summary>

### [`v1.5.0`](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/releases/tag/v1.5.0)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/compare/v1.4.1...v1.5.0)

#### What's Changed

- workflows: add PR comment on binary size check failure by [@​adrianreber](https://redirect.github.com/adrianreber) in [#​180](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/180)
- go.mod: update go-criu from v7 to v8 by [@​adrianreber](https://redirect.github.com/adrianreber) in [#​179](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/179)
- Update version number by [@​rst0git](https://redirect.github.com/rst0git) in [#​182](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/182)
- docs: document asciidoctor and Go version requirements and ignore install artifacts by [@​Lorygold](https://redirect.github.com/Lorygold) in [#​183](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/183)
- go.mod: update go-criu from v8 to v8.1.0 by [@​rst0git](https://redirect.github.com/rst0git) in [#​188](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/188)
- Add support for parsing of TaskState by [@​rst0git](https://redirect.github.com/rst0git) in [#​187](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/187)
- checkpointctl: Version 1.5.0 by [@​rst0git](https://redirect.github.com/rst0git) in [#​191](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/191)

#### New Contributors

- [@​Lorygold](https://redirect.github.com/Lorygold) made their first contribution in [#​183](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/183)
- [@​TusharMohapatra07](https://redirect.github.com/TusharMohapatra07) made their first contribution in [#​187](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/187)

**Full Changelog**: <https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/compare/v1.4.1...v1.5.0>

</details>
